channel.title: Christmas Tree Curbside Pickup & Recycling on 2023 Chistmas Tree Drive
channel.description: Recent content in Christmas Tree Curbside Pickup & Recycling on 2023 Chistmas Tree Drive

item.title: Lost & Found
item.description: Sometimes we find ornaments that people have left on their trees.

item.title: Registration Received
item.description: Registration Received You’re all set. We’ve received your registration to have your tree picked up on January 7, 2023.

item.title: Registration Received and Payment Sent
item.description: Registration Received You’re all set. We’ve received your registration and your payment has been sent to have your tree picked up on January 7, 2023.

item.title: Registration Received and Venmo Instructions
item.description: Registration Received We’ve received your registration to have your tree picked up on January 7, 2023.
